_meta.purpose: Static, hand-compiled trainer-aircraft fuel/performance profiles for the VFR NAVLOG Trainer (HSC Software Engineering sample PWA) — Stage 8 fuel calculation engine, and reused by Stage 11's checklists.
_meta.disclaimer: Training/demonstration figures only, rounded to typical published values for common trainer types. NOT for real flight planning — always use the current Pilot's Operating Handbook (POH) / aircraft flight manual figures for an actual aircraft.
_meta.compiledFrom: Typical published POH cruise fuel-burn/usable-fuel figures and generic normal-procedure checklist flows for these common trainer types, rounded/simplified for a training exemplar — no live or licensed data feed is used anywhere in this app.
_meta.fuelUnits: Litres (L) and litres-per-hour (L/h) throughout, converted from the imperial-gallon POH figures most trainer POHs are published in.
_meta.checklistDisclaimer: Generic normal-procedure checklists for training/demonstration only — always fly from the current, aircraft-specific POH/checklist, not this app.

checklists.label: Pre-start
items: Fuel quantity and quality checked (both tanks, drain sumps)
Master switch ON — fuel gauges checked

checklists.label: Pre-takeoff
items: Flight instruments — set (altimeter, DI aligned with compass)
Fuel selector — BOTH, fuel quantity sufficient
Engine run-up — magnetos and carb heat checked

checklists.label: Cruise
items: Heading and DI cross-checked against compass

checklists.label: Pre-landing
items: Landing checklist complete before circuit joining

checklists.label: Shutdown
items: Control lock fitted, chocks/tie-downs as required

checklists.label: Pre-start
items: Fuel quantity and quality checked (both tanks, drain sumps)
Master switch ON — fuel gauges and flaps checked

items: Flight instruments — set (altimeter, DI aligned with compass)
Fuel selector — BOTH, fuel quantity sufficient
Engine run-up — magnetos and carb heat checked

checklists.label: Shutdown

checklists.label: Pre-start
items: Fuel quantity and quality checked (both tanks, drain sumps)
Master switch ON — fuel gauges checked

checklists.label: Pre-takeoff
items: Flight instruments — set (altimeter, DI aligned with compass)
Fuel selector — select fullest tank, fuel pump ON
Engine run-up — magnetos and carb heat checked

checklists.label: Cruise
items: Fuel tanks — switch as required, balance checked
Heading and DI cross-checked against compass

checklists.label: Pre-landing
items: Fuel pump ON, fullest tank selected, mixture RICH
Landing checklist complete before circuit joining

checklists.label: Shutdown
items: Control lock fitted, chocks/tie-downs as required
